---
title: "Graph View"
toc: false
---

```{ojs}
//| echo: false

graph = FileAttachment("_graph-data.json").json()
d3 = require("d3@7")

// ── Controls ──────────────────────────────────────────────────
viewof searchTerm = Inputs.text({label: "Search", placeholder: "Filter nodes…", width: 220})
viewof showOrphans = Inputs.toggle({label: "Orphan nodes", value: true})
viewof showArrows  = Inputs.toggle({label: "Arrows", value: true})
viewof showLabels  = Inputs.toggle({label: "Labels", value: true})
viewof showTags    = Inputs.toggle({label: "Tag nodes", value: false})
viewof tagFilter   = Inputs.select(["all", ...graph.tags], {label: "Filter by tag", value: "all"})
viewof repelForce  = Inputs.range([-600, -50], {label: "Repel force", step: 10, value: -300})
viewof linkDist    = Inputs.range([40, 300],   {label: "Link distance", step: 10, value: 120})

// ── Graph rendering ──────────────────────────────────────────
chart = {
  // --- Prepare data (deep-copy so reactivity works) ---
  let nodes = graph.nodes.map(d => ({...d}));
  let links = graph.links.map(d => ({...d}));

  // Degree map (on full data, before filtering)
  const degree = new Map(nodes.map(n => [n.id, 0]));
  for (const l of links) {
    degree.set(l.source, (degree.get(l.source) || 0) + 1);
    degree.set(l.target, (degree.get(l.target) || 0) + 1);
  }

  // --- Apply filters ---
  // Tag filter
  if (tagFilter !== "all") {
    const keep = new Set(nodes.filter(n => n.tags.includes(tagFilter)).map(n => n.id));
    nodes = nodes.filter(n => keep.has(n.id));
    links = links.filter(l => keep.has(l.source) && keep.has(l.target));
  }

  // Orphan filter
  if (!showOrphans) {
    const linked = new Set();
    for (const l of links) { linked.add(l.source); linked.add(l.target); }
    nodes = nodes.filter(n => linked.has(n.id));
  }

  // Search highlight
  const searchLower = searchTerm.toLowerCase();
  const matchesSearch = (n) =>
    !searchTerm || n.title.toLowerCase().includes(searchLower) || n.id.toLowerCase().includes(searchLower) ||
    n.tags.some(t => t.toLowerCase().includes(searchLower));

  // --- Add tag nodes if toggled ---
  if (showTags) {
    const activeNodeIds = new Set(nodes.map(n => n.id));
    const tagsSeen = new Set();
    for (const n of nodes) {
      for (const t of n.tags) {
        if (!tagsSeen.has(t)) {
          tagsSeen.add(t);
          nodes.push({ id: `tag:${t}`, title: `#${t}`, file: null, tags: [], _isTag: true });
        }
        links.push({ source: n.id, target: `tag:${t}` });
      }
    }
  }

  // Radius scale
  const maxDeg = d3.max([...degree.values(), 1]);
  const radiusScale = d3.scaleSqrt().domain([0, maxDeg]).range([5, 18]);
  nodes.forEach(n => {
    n.radius = n._isTag ? 6 : radiusScale(degree.get(n.id) || 0);
  });

  const nodeIds = new Set(nodes.map(n => n.id));
  links = links.filter(l => nodeIds.has(l.source) && nodeIds.has(l.target));

  // --- SVG setup ---
  const width = 900;
  const height = 560;

  const svg = d3.create("svg")
    .attr("viewBox", [0, 0, width, height])
    .attr("width", "100%")
    .attr("height", height)
    .style("max-width", "100%")
    .style("background", "var(--bs-body-bg, #fff)")
    .style("border-radius", "8px")
    .style("border", "1px solid var(--bs-border-color, #dee2e6)")
    .style("cursor", "grab");

  // Container for zoom/pan
  const g = svg.append("g");

  // Zoom behaviour
  const zoom = d3.zoom()
    .scaleExtent([0.2, 5])
    .on("zoom", (event) => g.attr("transform", event.transform));
  svg.call(zoom);

  // Arrowhead marker
  if (showArrows) {
    svg.append("defs").append("marker")
      .attr("id", "arrow")
      .attr("viewBox", "0 -5 10 10")
      .attr("refX", 24).attr("refY", 0)
      .attr("markerWidth", 6).attr("markerHeight", 6)
      .attr("orient", "auto")
      .append("path")
      .attr("d", "M0,-5L10,0L0,5")
      .attr("fill", "var(--bs-secondary, #6c757d)");
  }

  // --- Simulation ---
  const simulation = d3.forceSimulation(nodes)
    .force("link", d3.forceLink(links).id(d => d.id).distance(linkDist))
    .force("charge", d3.forceManyBody().strength(repelForce))
    .force("center", d3.forceCenter(width / 2, height / 2))
    .force("collision", d3.forceCollide().radius(d => d.radius + 10));

  // --- Draw links ---
  const link = g.append("g")
    .selectAll("line")
    .data(links).join("line")
    .attr("stroke", "var(--bs-secondary, #6c757d)")
    .attr("stroke-opacity", 0.4)
    .attr("stroke-width", 1.5)
    .attr("marker-end", showArrows ? "url(#arrow)" : null);

  // --- Draw nodes ---
  const node = g.append("g")
    .selectAll("g")
    .data(nodes).join("g")
    .call(drag(simulation));

  // Node colour
  const nodeColor = (d) => {
    if (d._isTag) return "var(--bs-success, #198754)";
    if (!d.file) return "var(--bs-warning, #ffc107)";
    return "var(--bs-primary, #0d6efd)";
  };

  node.append("circle")
    .attr("r", d => d.radius)
    .attr("fill", nodeColor)
    .attr("stroke", "var(--bs-body-bg, #fff)")
    .attr("stroke-width", 2)
    .attr("opacity", d => matchesSearch(d) ? 1 : 0.2);

  // Labels
  if (showLabels) {
    node.append("text")
      .text(d => d.title)
      .attr("x", d => d.radius + 4)
      .attr("y", 4)
      .attr("font-size", d => d._isTag ? "10px" : "12px")
      .attr("font-style", d => d._isTag ? "italic" : "normal")
      .attr("fill", "var(--bs-body-color, #212529)")
      .attr("opacity", d => matchesSearch(d) ? 1 : 0.15)
      .style("pointer-events", "none");
  }

  // Click to navigate
  node.style("cursor", d => d.file ? "pointer" : "default")
    .on("click", (event, d) => {
      if (d.file) window.location.href = d.file.replace(/\.(qmd|md)$/, ".html");
    });

  // Tooltip
  node.append("title").text(d => {
    let tip = d.title;
    if (d.tags && d.tags.length) tip += `\nTags: ${d.tags.join(", ")}`;
    tip += `\nConnections: ${degree.get(d.id) || 0}`;
    return tip;
  });

  // --- Hover: highlight neighbours, dim rest ---
  const linkedByIndex = new Set();
  links.forEach(l => {
    const src = typeof l.source === "object" ? l.source.id : l.source;
    const tgt = typeof l.target === "object" ? l.target.id : l.target;
    linkedByIndex.add(`${src}--${tgt}`);
    linkedByIndex.add(`${tgt}--${src}`);
  });
  const isNeighbour = (a, b) => a === b || linkedByIndex.has(`${a}--${b}`);

  node.on("mouseenter", (event, d) => {
    node.select("circle").transition().duration(150)
      .attr("opacity", o => isNeighbour(d.id, o.id) ? 1 : 0.1);
    node.select("text").transition().duration(150)
      .attr("opacity", o => isNeighbour(d.id, o.id) ? 1 : 0.05);
    link.transition().duration(150)
      .attr("stroke-opacity", l => {
        const src = typeof l.source === "object" ? l.source.id : l.source;
        const tgt = typeof l.target === "object" ? l.target.id : l.target;
        return (src === d.id || tgt === d.id) ? 0.8 : 0.05;
      });
  }).on("mouseleave", () => {
    node.select("circle").transition().duration(300)
      .attr("opacity", o => matchesSearch(o) ? 1 : 0.2);
    node.select("text").transition().duration(300)
      .attr("opacity", o => matchesSearch(o) ? 1 : 0.15);
    link.transition().duration(300).attr("stroke-opacity", 0.4);
  });

  // --- Tick ---
  simulation.on("tick", () => {
    link
      .attr("x1", d => d.source.x).attr("y1", d => d.source.y)
      .attr("x2", d => d.target.x).attr("y2", d => d.target.y);
    node.attr("transform", d => `translate(${d.x},${d.y})`);
  });

  function drag(simulation) {
    return d3.drag()
      .on("start", (event, d) => {
        if (!event.active) simulation.alphaTarget(0.3).restart();
        d.fx = d.x; d.fy = d.y;
      })
      .on("drag", (event, d) => { d.fx = event.x; d.fy = event.y; })
      .on("end", (event, d) => {
        if (!event.active) simulation.alphaTarget(0);
        d.fx = null; d.fy = null;
      });
  }

  // --- Reset zoom button ---
  svg.append("g")
    .attr("transform", `translate(${width - 40}, 20)`)
    .style("cursor", "pointer")
    .on("click", () => svg.transition().duration(500).call(zoom.transform, d3.zoomIdentity))
    .call(g => {
      g.append("rect").attr("width", 28).attr("height", 28).attr("rx", 4)
        .attr("fill", "var(--bs-body-bg, #fff)")
        .attr("stroke", "var(--bs-border-color, #dee2e6)");
      g.append("text").text("⌂").attr("x", 6).attr("y", 20)
        .attr("font-size", "18px").attr("fill", "var(--bs-body-color, #212529)");
    });

  return svg.node();
}
```

::: {.callout-tip collapse="true"}
## How to use

- **Zoom**: scroll wheel or pinch; **Pan**: click and drag the background
- **Drag nodes** to rearrange; **Click** a node to navigate to that note
- **Hover** a node to highlight its direct connections
- **Search** filters nodes by title, filename, or tag
- **Reset zoom** with the ⌂ button (top-right of graph)

**Legend:** <span style="color:var(--bs-primary)">●</span> note &nbsp; <span style="color:var(--bs-warning)">●</span> unresolved link &nbsp; <span style="color:var(--bs-success)">●</span> tag node
:::
